summary: Iteration 36: Tested authentication, password reset, Google login, and invitation flow fixes (Req #16). All 26 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. All reported issues have been fixed.
passed_tests: A. POST /api/user/register - returns 400 for missing email
A. POST /api/user/register - returns 400 for missing password
A. POST /api/user/register - returns 400 for password < 6 chars
A. POST /api/user/register - succeeds with valid data
A. POST /api/user/register - returns 400 for duplicate email
A. POST /api/user/login - returns 400 for missing credentials
A. POST /api/user/login - returns 401 for invalid credentials
A. POST /api/user/login - succeeds with valid credentials
A. Error handling shows 'Invalid credentials' (not 'Failed to fetch')
B. Google sign-in button present on login page
B. Google sign-in redirects to auth.emergentagent.com
C. POST /api/user/forgot-password - returns 400 without email
C. POST /api/user/forgot-password - returns success message (prevents email enumeration)
C. POST /api/user/forgot-password - accepts origin_url parameter
C. POST /api/user/reset-password - returns 400 without token
C. POST /api/user/reset-password - returns 400 for short password
C. POST /api/user/reset-password - returns 400 for invalid token
C. Password reset email has clickable button AND plaintext URL fallback (code verified)
C. Reset password page loads with form elements
C. Reset password page shows error for invalid token
D. GET /api/invitation/verify/{id} - returns valid=false for nonexistent
D. GET /api/invitation/verify/{id} - handles invalid format
D. POST /api/invitation/accept/{id} - handles nonexistent invitation
D. Invitation URL includes email parameter (/login?invite=xxx&email=xxx)
D. Invitation signup page pre-fills email from URL
D. 'You've been invited!' notice shows with invited email
D. 'Email is locked to the invited address' message displayed
D. Email field prevents changes when invitation token present (shows toast error)
POST /api/auth/login - admin login works
GET /api/admin/invitations - returns invitations list with stats
POST /api/admin/invitations/send - returns 400 without email
POST /api/admin/invitations/send - returns 400 with invalid email
POST /api/user/invite - returns 401/403 without auth
POST /api/user/invite - returns 400 without email
POST /api/user/invite - returns 400 with invalid email
critical_code_review_comments: public_auth.py: Password reset email correctly includes both clickable button (line 47-49) AND plaintext URL fallback (line 51-54)
public_auth.py: Uses production URL if localhost/preview detected (line 26-27)
invitations.py: Invitation email includes email parameter in URL (line 34): /login?invite={token}&email={encoded_email}
invitations.py: Invitation email has both clickable button AND plaintext URL fallback
UserLoginPage.jsx: Handles invite token - pre-fills email (line 43), shows invitation notice (line 359-364), locks email field (line 392-393)
UserLoginPage.jsx: Email field uses readOnly attribute and onChange handler prevents changes with toast error (line 386-390)
UserLoginPage.jsx: Validates invitation email on submit (line 106-110)
ResetPasswordPage.jsx: Complete reset password UI with form validation and error handling
seed_data_creation: Created test users during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36 verified all fixes for Req #16: A) Sign-up/login APIs work correctly with proper error handling showing 'Invalid credentials' instead of 'Failed to fetch', B) Google sign-in button present and redirects correctly, C) Password reset email has clickable button AND plaintext URL fallback, reset password page works correctly, D) Invitation URL includes email parameter, email is pre-filled and locked on signup page, 'You've been invited!' notice displays with invited email. All 26 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.
